label: Full Video
description: Entire video analyzed as one unit. One scalar value per video.

label: Hook Window (0-10%)
description: First 10 percent of video. Hook and opening retention behavior.

label: 0-25% of Video
description: Retention window from 0% to 25% of video.

description: Retention window from 0% to 50% of video.

description: Retention window 10%-20%.
